name: Taco Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Ro-Tel tomatoes with green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain off excess fat.
2. Mix together the cream of celery soup, beef broth, taco seasoning, and Ro-Tel tomatoes in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Layer half of the tortilla chips evenly over the bottom of a greased casserole dish.
5. Pour the soup mixture over the tortilla chips.
6. Sprinkle with remaining tortilla chips and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
8. Turn off the heat and let the casserole cool slightly before serving.
